action: Freeze repeated acoustic trial protocols and preserve append-only challenge records before statistical evaluation.

progress.finding: R-040's fixed-sample binomial gate requires enforceable protection against optional stopping, selective omission, challenge replay, and mutable trial history.
progress.verification: 6 deterministic Node tests passed in an isolated runtime using byte-identical pre-commit source.

handoff: Vercel Studio should create the protocol before the first R-039 challenge, persist every returned ledger state outside mutable page memory, and call R-040 only when verifyTrialLedger reports evaluationAllowed=true.
limits: The hash chain is tamper-evident only relative to a retained trusted digest or external attestation. It does not establish microphone integrity, trial independence, physical audibility, conscious perception, or causal exclusivity.
